pr.title: Record: 1.1387 BPB — 11L LeakyReLU² + Early QAT@0.5 + GPTQ-lite + EMA

output.summary: 11-layer 512d transformer couples Muon+AdamW with EMA and early STE QAT at LR scale 0.5 plus GPTQ-lite per-row int6/8 quantization before sliding eval.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Training used the standard dataset rather than a validation-only regimen.
techniques: Early STE QAT triggered at LR scale 0.5 for ~1400 int6 steps
GPTQ-lite per-row clip search with mixed int6/int8 export and zstd compression
Muon+AdamW with EMA and sliding-window stride-64 evaluation
